series_metadata.series_description: Tax Commissioner Agents (TCA) and Tax Auditor Agents (TAA)are required to take a test at the end of their technical training. TCA''''''''s need a passing range of 70%. If he/she fails, then the supervisor and TCA is notified. The TAA also must get a passing range of 70%. If he/she fails, then they must retake the class and test.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Keep as long as employee is employed with the department., Electronic: Erase
